{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Tenth Elder
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Tenth Elder]] is a gray-haired man with a [[jade]] badge and is the youngest and least of the clan's ruling council.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
